LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO AFT LOCAL 61'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES SHALL PROCEED TO ARBITRATE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THEIR AGREEMENT AND ON THE BASIS OF THE LIST PROVIDED BY CSMCS. THE REQUEST FOR A STATEMENT OF DECISION WAS DENIED BY THE COURT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
